metadata.title: Volmer Techniek B.V. — Precision machining on-site and in the workshop
metadata.description: Volmer Techniek provides on-site machining, industrial repairs and precision machining in Puttershoek. Fast response, precise work, minimal downtime.
metadata.keywords: on-site machining, precision machining, industrial repairs, machine building, Puttershoek, retrofit, preventive maintenance

hero.lede: Accurate machining, repair and modification. We minimise downtime, on-site or in our workshop in Puttershoek.

services.heading: Six disciplines. One point of contact.

items.title: On-site machining
items.description: When a machine cannot be brought to the workshop, we bring the machining to the machine. Turning, milling and boring directly on-site, without dismantling, without transport and without unnecessary downtime.

items.title: Workshop machining
items.description: Precision turning, milling and boring for custom parts, replacement parts and restoration work. Tolerances down to ±0.02mm. From single pieces to small series.

items.title: Industrial repairs
items.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of damaged or worn machine parts, on-site or in our workshop. From broken shafts to worn bearing blocks. Focused on minimal downtime and reliable delivery.

items.title: Machine building and custom work
items.description: Design and realisation of custom parts and solutions for industrial applications. From one-off replacement parts to complete sub-assemblies. We think along from drawing to delivery.

items.title: Retrofit and modernisation
items.description: Adapting, improving or updating existing machines without full replacement. We bring outdated installations up to the required level, more cost-effective than new construction and preserving what works.

items.title: Preventive maintenance
items.description: Regular inspection and maintenance of critical machine parts to prevent unplanned downtime. We draw up a maintenance programme that fits your production cycle.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: We map the situation: machine type, nature of the problem, desired outcome and any limitations on-site or in scheduling.

steps.title: Technical evaluation
steps.description: Based on the assessment, we determine the right approach, required equipment, lead time and any risks. You receive a concrete quote for approval.

steps.title: Execution on-site or in workshop
steps.description: We carry out the work where it is most efficient: at your location or in our workshop in Puttershoek. No surprises, clear communication throughout the process.

steps.title: Inspection and delivery
steps.description: Before delivery, we check the work against specifications and functionality. You receive a report of the completed work.

steps.title: Advice for follow-up and maintenance
steps.description: Where relevant, we advise on preventive maintenance, re-inspection intervals or possible improvements to prevent recurrence of the problem.

about.heading: Craftsmanship from Puttershoek.
about.intro: Volmer Techniek is a technical metalworking company specialising in precision machining. We turn, mill and bore for heavy industry, on-site at the client or in our workshop in Puttershoek.
about.body: One point of contact for all your precision machining. Whether it is an urgent job on a stopped production line or precision custom work for a new installation, we deliver what we agree.

contact.heading: Discuss your technical challenge.
contact.intro: Do you have a stopped machine, need a repair or a custom solution? Get in touch and we will respond quickly.
contact.address: Pieter van der Wallstraat 4, 3297 ES Puttershoek

success.title: Request received
success.message: Thank you for your request. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

work.heading: Where steel takes shape.
work.intro: A selection of the work that passes through our hands every day — on-site and in our workshop in Puttershoek.

serviceArea.heading: On-site, wherever your machine runs.
serviceArea.body: Our workshop is in Puttershoek, in the Hoeksche Waard. For on-site machining and urgent repairs we come to your location — in the region or anywhere in the Netherlands. That keeps downtime short and the lines of communication shorter.

footer.tagline: Precision machining on-site and in the workshop.
